description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa with a high backrest and gently flared armrests, upholstered in a solid mustard yellow fabric. The seat features three individual, evenly sized cushions that are integrated into the frame, providing a uniform and structured appearance. The backrest is continuous and curves slightly at the top corners, creating a subtle wingback effect for added comfort and style. The sofa stands on four short, cylindrical wooden legs, which are positioned at each corner and finished in a light natural wood tone. The upholstery appears smooth and matte, with no visible decorative stitching or tufting, giving the piece a clean and contemporary look. This sofa would be suitable for placement in urban parks, public waiting areas, or outdoor lounges, offering both comfort and visual appeal.
description: A modern mustard yellow three-seater sofa with a high, continuous backrest, flared armrests, and smooth upholstery, supported by four short wooden legs. The design is clean, structured, and visually inviting.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sofa's three seat cushions, high backrest, and flared armrests, highlighting its symmetrical and inviting design.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the sofa's depth, the gentle outward curve of the armrest, and the thickness of the seat cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous, unadorned backrest and the sofa's overall width, with the wooden legs just visible at the corners.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, emphasizing the sofa's consistent profile and the smooth transition from armrest to backrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual, attached seat cushions in a single row; no visible separate back cushions; cushions are uniform in size and integrated into the frame.
attribute_armrest_style: Present, high and gently flared outward, matching the height of the backrest; armrests are thick, padded, and smoothly contoured with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, cylindrical legs made of light wood, positioned at each corner; legs are exposed and have a simple, modern style with no additional ornamentation.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous backrest with a slight wingback curve at the top corners; no segmentation or tufting; backrest is smoothly upholstered and integrated with the armrests.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery in mustard yellow; fabric appears smooth and matte with no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
